title: lobelia borneensis subsp. celebensis
intro: Lobelia borneensis subsp. celebensis, also known as Celebes lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the island of Sulawesi (Celebes) in Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Celebes lobelia include relieving respiratory problems, reducing inflammation, and soothing muscle cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Celebes lobelia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
